title: Bitter Tender Mexican Chickpea Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly mexican dish featuring palm sugar in a bitter and tender chickpea stir-fry, perfect for snacking or as part of a meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup soy sauce (or tamari for gluten-free option)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and red bell peppers for another minute.
Toss in chickpeas, ground cumin, soy sauce (tamari), palm sugar, salt, and pepper. Stir everything together well.
Cook until most of the liquid is absorbed, about 5-7 minutes.
If needed, reduce heat to low and continue to cook for an additional 3-5 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
